pages.empty: No pages have been created yet.

settings.title: BBCode Settings
settings.bbcode_help: Enable or disable custom BBCode tags for page rendering. Changes require clearing the formatter cache (php flarum cache:clear).
settings.bbcode_url: [url] — Extended URL parser (accepts URLs rejected by Flarum)
settings.forum_help: Override how spoilers are displayed in regular forum posts. Requires clearing the formatter cache (php flarum cache:clear).
settings.replace_forum_spoiler: Replace Flarum's default spoiler with Advanced Pages spoiler style (details/summary)

edit_page.visible_groups_help: Leave all checked to make the page visible to everyone. Uncheck groups to restrict access. Admins always have access.
edit_page.delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this page? This action cannot be undone.
edit_page.unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?
edit_page.php_warning: PHP pages execute server-side code. Only create PHP pages if you understand the security implications. Errors are logged but never displayed to visitors.

support.title: Support This Extension
support.description: If you find this extension useful, please consider supporting its development with a small donation. Every contribution helps keep the project alive and maintained.

page.not_found_message: The page you are looking for does not exist or you do not have permission to view it.
